channel.title: Links on Erlich Bachman
channel.description: Recent content in Links on Erlich Bachman

item.title: Related Work
item.description: Notable work by others Machine Learning Sepp Hochreiterm Jürgen Schmidhuber (1997): Long short-term memory. Neural Computation. 9 (8): 1735–1780. doi:10.1162/neco.1997.9.8.1735. Maybe also with short comment from our side. Hydrology Chaopeng Shen (2018): A transdisciplinary review of deep learning research and its relevance for water resources scientists. Water Resources Research 54, no. 11 (2018): 8558-8593. Private Sector Google Allen
